s108764: Bangkok Sanqing Shuiwei Shengniang Miao

Name: Bangkok Sanqing Shuiwei Shengniang Miao, 曼谷三清水尾聖娘廟
Type: Taoist temple, 廟, temple
ID: s108764
Description:
Bangkok Sanqing Shuiwei Shengniang Miao 曼谷三清水尾聖娘廟 "thakbongID"=
CSFB=csfb-a13"
CSFB-mainText"="csfb-m6"
CGB-appendix"="cgb-102"
templeName-thai"="ศาลเจ้า จุ้ยโบเบี้ยว (แม่ทับทิม)"
templeName-en"="Chui Bo Niao (Mae Thapthim Samsen)"
templeName-zh"="水尾聖娘廟"
khet-เขต"="ดุสิต"
khet-en"="Dusit"
notes"="三清水尾聖娘廟"
CGB-主神"=
deity-group"="Mae Thaptim"
Longitude: 100.504155
Latitude: 13.779996
